goals.title: API 없이 카드뉴스 초안 이후 흐름을 완료한다. 승인된 카드만 확정해서 .vibelign/reports/card-news...
goals.objective: API 없이 카드뉴스 초안 이후 흐름을 완료한다. 승인된 카드만 확정해서 .vibelign/reports/card-news 아래 JSON/HTML 결과물로 저장하고, GUI에서 카드뉴스 HTML을 열 수 있어야 한다. 이미지 생성 API는 붙이지 않고 provider-neutral-draft와 편집 가능한 한국어 오버레이를 유지한다.

successCriteria.scenario: Browser use: start vibelign-gui dev server, open http://127.0.0.1:<port>/.visual-qa/card-news-finalize.html, click '카드뉴스 확정', expect status text containing '카드뉴스 결과물' and an HTML path ending .vibelign/reports/card-news/*.html; capture screenshot and Playwright action log.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Browser QA refreshed after Instagram-style summary-card format change: desktop/mobile Chrome click 카드뉴스 확정; result/path visible; REPORT CARD NEWS, Korean title/source values visible; no horizontal overflow. Evidence: C001-browser-finalize.json, C001-browser-finalize-mobile.json, C001-card-news-finalize.png, C001-card-news-finalize-mobile.png. CLI happy path writes approved-only JSON/HTML with source refs, no script/network refs: C001-cli-happy.txt.

successCriteria.scenario: CLI auxiliary surface: in a temp project, run vib report-card-news <payload.json> --json where payload has zero approved cards; expect exit code 1 JSON {ok:false,error contains '승인'} and no .vibelign/reports/card-news HTML output.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Edge CLI refreshed: zero approved exits 1 with Korean 승인 error; approved string false fails closed through strict payload validation; symlinked output dir exits 1 and outside dir remains empty. Evidence: C002-empty-approved-cli.txt.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression auxiliary surface: run focused Python and Vitest report/card-news tests, including existing vib report --visual-cards JSON and report composer tab tests; expect all pass.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Regression refreshed: uv pytest report/card-news bundle 27 passed; GUI Vitest 3 files / 16 tests passed; npm run build passed with existing chunk-size warning; scoped basedpyright 0 errors/0 warnings; git diff --check passed. Evidence: C003-regression-tests.txt, gui-regression-tests.txt, python-type-check-card-news.txt.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/report-card-news-complete/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/report-card-news-complete/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
